title: 1950–51 FK Partizan season - Wikipedia
body: Partizan 1950–51 football season Partizan 1950–51 [ 1 ] season Head coach Illés Spitz Yugoslav First League 4th Yugoslav Cup Semi-finals ← 1949–50 1951–52 → The 1950–51 season was the fifth season in FK Partizan 's existence. This article shows player statistics and matches that the club played during the 1950–51 season. Players [ edit ] Squad information [ edit ] Šoštarić , Belin , Čolić , Čajkovski , Jovanović , Jakovetić , Bogojevac, Bobek , Valok , Atanacković , Herceg , Stojanović, Lazarević, Kolaković , P. Mihajlović , Zebec , Vorgić, Šijaković , Drenovac , Ančić, Srdzbadija Stanković, Stipić, Tapiška, Torbarov, Stokić, Ruman, Miloš Milutinović, Marjanović, Krajišnik, Branilović, Simonovski.
